news.summary: Encompass Health Corp. (NYSE: EHC) has announced that its annual meeting of stockholders is scheduled to take place at 11:00 a.m. CDT on Thursday, May 1, 2025, in Birmingham, Alabama. This year, the meeting will be held exclusively through a live webcast. Stockholders who were recorded as of March 7, 2025, will have the opportunity to participate in the event.
news.headline: Encompass Health annual stockholder meeting on May 1, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. CDT. Live webcast only. April 16, 2025.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 16, 2025, Brinker International, Inc. (NYSE: EAT) announced an upcoming earnings conference call set for 10 a.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. The call is intended to discuss the third quarter fiscal 2025 earnings, to be disclosed before the market opens on the same day.
news.headline: Brinker International, Inc. to host Q3 fiscal 2025 earnings call on April 29, 2025 at 10 a.m. EST. $EAT (NYSE)

news.summary: Yuping Huang has been appointed as the interim CEO and President of Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi), a company specializing in integrated photonics and quantum optics technology. This announcement was made on April 16, 2025, in Hoboken, New Jersey. Qi is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol QUBT. Dr. Huang will be taking over as the Chief Executive Officer of the Company.
news.headline: CEO and President Dr. William McGann retires from Quantum Computing Inc., Dr. Yuping Huang named interim CEO.

news.summary: In the rapidly expanding Latin American market, Peru has given the green light to the herbicide Keenali™, marking a significant shift in rice weed control. This approval, granted to FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) - a prominent player in agricultural sciences, signals the company's success in breaching this high-growth market. The decision paves the way for enhanced weed management strategies in the region, with promising implications for agricultural productivity.
news.headline: FMC secures global registration for Dodhylex™ active. Peru approves Keenali™ herbicide, revolutionizing rice weed control.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, a company based in Menlo Park, California, revealed plans to disclose its first-quarter 2025 financial results on April 23, 2025, at around 4:05 p.m. EDT. The company, trading on NYSE under the symbol RHI, will have its management host a conference call at 5 p.m. EDT on the same day to discuss the results.
news.headline: Robert Half to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 23 at 4:05 pm EDT with a conference call at 5 pm EDT.

news.summary: In Miami on April 16, 2025, Trax, a prominent global provider of digital aviation maintenance and engineering software, revealed that Amerijet International Airlines, an international cargo carrier, opted for Trax's eMRO and eMobility suite to improve its maintenance processes.
news.headline: Trax's eMRO and eMobility suite chosen by Amerijet Int'l to enhance maintenance operations. April 16, 2025.

news.summary: F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) announced its first quarter 2025 earnings with a notable Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) Ratio reaching a record high of 10.7%. The company also showed robust growth in Tangible Book Value per Share (non-GAAP) by 12.3% and an increase in Net Interest Income by 1.5%. These results demonstrate the financial strength and performance of F.N.B. Corporation in the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: F.N.B. Corporation's Q1 2025 earnings reflect a CET1 ratio of 10.7% and 12.3% growth in tangible book value per share.

news.summary: Aspen Aerogels, Inc., a company based in Northborough, Massachusetts, revealed today that its President & CEO, Don Young, along with its CFO & Treasurer, Ricardo C. Rodriguez, are set to talk about the company's financial situation. The company's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ASPN. This information was announced on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Aspen Aerogels, Inc. announces Q1 2025 earnings release and conference call. Don Young & Ricardo C. Rodriguez to discuss financials.

news.summary: A new Stretch Zone location has recently opened in Bakersfield, California, under local leadership. This franchise is known for its patented strapping system on exclusive tables for assisted stretching. The establishment is part of the leading assisted-stretching brand in the country. The location began operations on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: New Stretch Zone location opens in Bakersfield, CA with a patented strapping system on tables. The grand opening is on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Today, Houston-based financial institution Prosperity Bancshares, Inc.® declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.58 per share for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend will be payable on July 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 13, 2025. Prosperity Bancshares, Inc.® is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PB.
news.headline: Prosperity Bancshares, Inc.® (NYSE: PB) declares $0.58/share dividend, payable July 1, 2025 to record shareholders by June 13.

news.summary: Today, in Steinhause, Switzerland, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) released its latest quarterly Fleet Status Report detailing crucial information about the offshore drilling rigs it operates. This report offers insights into the current status and contractual details of the company's rig fleet.
news.headline: Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) releases fleet status report, detailing current status and contracts for offshore drilling rigs.

news.summary: A conference call has been arranged for 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on May 8, 2025. Participants are expected to join the call at this scheduled time.
news.headline: BigCommerce will announce Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025 with 8:00 am ET conference call.

news.summary: Athene Holding Ltd., a subsidiary of Apollo Global Management, Inc., based in West Des Moines, Iowa, disclosed plans to conduct a Fixed Income Investor Call on May 12, 2025, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. The call aims to provide essential insights and updates to investors. Apollo Global Management is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol APO. This initiative highlights Athene's commitment to engaging with stakeholders and keeping them informed about the company's fixed income activities.
news.headline: Athene, subsidiary of Apollo Global Management, to host Fixed Income Investor Call on May 12, 2025 at 10:00AM ET.

news.summary: In Taber, Alberta on April 16, 2025, a company known as Flexible Solutions International, Inc. (NYSE-AMERICAN: FSI) revealed itself as a prominent developer and producer of biodegradable polymers for various industries such as oil extraction, detergent ingredients, water treatment, and crop nutrient availability chemistry. The company also specializes in creating environmentally friendly water and energy conservation technologies. Furthermore, FSI is expanding its reach into the food and nutrition supplement manufacturing sectors. Reporting on their financial performance for the first quarter of 2025, the company announced its Q1 revenue, demonstrating its robust position in the market.
news.headline: FSI reports Q1 2025 revenue, focuses on biodegradable polymers, water conservation tech, & food market growth.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE: DTM) disclosed their intent to unveil their financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 before the market commences trading on Wednesday, April 30, 2025.
news.headline: DT Midstream (NYSE: DTM) to reveal Q1 2025 earnings on April 30, 2025. Announcement before market opens.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) announced that it is set to disclose its financial results for the first quarter of the fiscal year prior to the market opening on Wednesday, April 23, 2025. Following this release, the company will conduct a conference call at 9:30 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to analyze the outcomes. During the conference call, there might be discussions involving forward-looking statements.
news.headline: Stifel Financial to report Q1 2025 results on April 23, holds call at 9:30 am ET. Look for NYSE: SF updates.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 16, 2025, Memoir Fragrances and The Brooklyn Circus introduced a new collaborative scent named Baptiste. This fragrance pays tribute to the innovative legacy of Jean Baptiste Point du Sable, the founder of Chicago. Baptiste embodies the rich history of both companies, symbolizing a fusion of scents that honors du Sable's remarkable story.
news.headline: Memoir Fragrances and The Brooklyn Circus launch Baptiste fragrance, honoring Chicago's founder with deep ties to both brands.

news.summary: Target stores will soon offer Clean Simple Eats' top-selling Protein Powders at various locations. The company's renowned Greens + Superfoods will also be available at select Target stores. Clean Simple Eats (CSE), a prominent health and wellness brand, will introduce these products in several locations. Salt Lake City, April 16, 2025 — The move aims to increase accessibility, with a focus on offering quality nutrition to a broader market. Clean Simple Eats stands out for its delicious Protein Powders and other products. Look out for these items at designated Target stores, marking a significant expansion for CSE's products within the retail sphere.
news.headline: Clean Simple Eats (CSE) expands to Target stores, offering protein powders in select locations, along with popular superfoods.

news.summary: A renowned Italian bakery in New York has recently launched a new range of pinsas, along with dessert-topped lattes and Korean breads. Angelina Bakery, located in New York City, is now expanding its market reach to include Boston and other areas. The bakery is famous for its "Greatest Bomboloni" and has become a beloved spot for many. The announcement was made on April 16, 2025, in Fort Lee, New Jersey. This move is a part of the bakery's strategy to explore new opportunities and widen its customer base.
news.headline: Angelina Bakery in Fort Lee, NJ introduces new specialty menu and eyes expansion into Boston, beyond tri-state area.

news.summary: Redwood Trust, Inc., a prominent player in bolstering housing access for buyers and renters, is set to unveil its first-quarter 2025 financial performance on April 30, 2025, post the New York Stock Exchange's closing. Following this, the company's executives will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time / 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time on the same day to delve into the details of the results. Redwood Trust, Inc. trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RWT.
news.headline: Redwood Trust will release its first quarter 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, followed by a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Los Angeles, Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), a real estate investment trust specializing in industrial properties in Southern California, announced its strategy to create value through investments and operations in the region. The company focuses on infill locations in Southern California to maximize growth opportunities.
news.headline: Rexford Industrial reports Q1 2025 financial results, focused on industrial properties in SoCal.

news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Dr. Natalie Nelson-Marsh will integrate artificial intelligence prominently in the 'Future of Work' Organizational Communication class at the University of Portland this fall. This move will offer students a deep dive into the ethical implications of AI's growing presence in the workforce. While engaging with AI tools and assignments, learners will critically analyze the technology's impact on the global workforce they are soon to enter. This initiative is part of a lineup of six courses offered at the university.
news.headline: University of Portland students to study AI ethics in 'Future of Work' class, examining its impact on workforce.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has reached 12%, indicating a significant increase from the previous quarter which stood at 8%. The data shows that over 3 million people are currently without jobs, marking a record high for the country. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job opportunities in various sectors, with the hardest hit being the service industry, where job openings have decreased by 20%. The government is now facing pressure to implement measures to address this alarming spike in unemployment and provide support to those affected.
news.headline: Hess Midstream LP to hold financial results call.

news.summary: Jerome H. Powell cautioned about the potential impact of President Trump's tariffs, stating that they could create a difficult situation for the central bank.
news.headline: Jerome Powell warns Trump tariffs could cause higher inflation & slower growth, posing a challenge for the central bank.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced their financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company's earnings report and presentation for the first quarter of 2025 are now available for viewing.
news.headline: Cohen & Steers (NYSE: CNS) reported Q1 2025 results on April 16, 2025. Earnings and presentation details available online.

news.summary: Tariffs are not projected to have a significant long-term impact on the stock market, despite conventional economic theories suggesting otherwise. In the current economic climate, where the economy is not in optimal health, other factors will likely overshadow the effects of tariffs. The Federal Reserve has the ability to artificially inflate stock prices by injecting money into the economy through digital means. This is expected to happen soon, not out of choice but out of necessity. The United States is facing a massive debt of $36.6 trillion, with $9.2 trillion needing to be dealt with this year through refinancing or repayment. Regardless of how this debt is managed, whether through taxing citizens, reducing government spending, reallocating funds, or through quantitative easing (printing money), the outcome is forecasted to lead to an increase in stock prices. For further details on this topic, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Tariffs won't impact stock market long-term; Fed may boost stocks due to $9.2 trillion debt situation.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Satellogic Inc. concluded the acquisition and sale of 6,451,612 shares of its Class A Common Stock at a rate of $3.10 per share in a registered direct offering. This transaction was completed through a definitive share purchase agreement with a specific institutional investor on April 15, 2025. Satellogic Inc., a prominent provider of high-resolution Earth observation data, sealed this deal on the NASDAQ market under the ticker symbol SATL.
news.headline: Satellogic closed $20M offering with 6,451,612 shares at $3.10 each to an institutional investor on April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In a noteworthy development, Springbot has revamped itself into a unified marketing and sales enablement platform after more than a decade in the e-commerce automation sector. The company, initially based in Atlanta before moving its headquarters to Charleston, South Carolina, has combined its services into three integrated components. This move underlines the increasing fusion of marketing technology and AI, marking a significant shift for the business.
news.headline: Springbot transformed into a full-stack marketing and sales platform, moving HQ to Charleston, SC after 12 years in e-commerce, emphasizing AI.

news.summary: In New York, NY, on April 16, 2025, Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V (Nasdaq: LOKVU) announced that starting April 21, 2025, holders of units from the Company's initial public offering can choose to trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants separately. Only whole warrants will be traded as no fractional warrants will be issued upon separation. The separated Class A ordinary shares will trade as "LOKV" while the warrants will trade as "LOKVW" on the Nasdaq Global Market. Units that remain combined will still be traded as "LOKVU" on the Nasdaq Global Market.
news.headline: Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V to allow separate trading of Class A shares and warrants from April 21, 2025 on Nasdaq.

news.summary: Boise, Idaho-based Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWAN), a prominent global provider of SaaS-based services for investment management, accounting, reporting, and analytics, is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The report will be unveiled after the closing of the U.S. financial markets on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. Furthermore, a conference call is scheduled to take place on the same day at 5:00 p.m. in conjunction with the financial results announcement.
news.headline: Clearwater Analytics (NYSE: CWAN) to announce Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025 after markets close. Conference call at 5:00 p.m.

news.summary: Xylem Inc. (NYSE: XYL) revealed plans to join two upcoming conferences. The Oppenheimer Industrials Conference on May 5 will be hosted virtually, featuring presentations from Management and Investor Relations, along with investor meetings. Following this, the company will take part in the Stifel Industrials Conference in Boston on June 4, where Management and Investor Relations will present and engage with participants. Xylem Inc. is committed to promoting global water solutions and fostering water security, actively contributing to addressing water-related challenges worldwide.
news.headline: Xylem to participate in investor conferences: Oppenheimer  on May 5 (virtual) and Stifel on June 4 (Boston).

news.summary: FICO, a global leader in analytics software, is set to announce its second quarter fiscal 2025 results on April 29, 2025, after the market closes. Following this, a conference call is scheduled for April 29th at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time, with alternative times available at 4:00 p.m. Central and 2:00 p.m. Pacific. The call will be webcast on FICO’s official website at www.fico.com/investors. For those unable to participate, a replay of the webcast will be accessible on the Event Calendar under Past Events until April 29, 2026. FICO is listed on the NYSE.
news.headline: FICO to report Q2 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025, with conference call scheduled at 5:00 pm EST. Visit www.fico.com/investors for webcast access. Replay available until April 29, 2026.

news.summary: Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWAN), a global provider of SaaS investment management solutions, shared that its executive leaders will engage in investor conferences in Q2 2025. CEO Sandeep Sahai will take part in discussions. Clearwater offers services such as accounting and analytics.
news.headline: Clearwater Analytics (NYSE: CWAN) to join investor conferences in Q2 2025; CEO Sandeep Sahai to share insights.

news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation in Issaquah, Wash., declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common stock with an approved increase from $1.16 to $1.30 per share, equaling $5.20 annually. Shareholders of record at the close of business on May 2, 2025, will receive the dividend payable on May 16, 2025. The dividend increase reflects the company's financial health and commitment to rewarding shareholders.
news.headline: Costco raises quarterly cash dividend from $1.16 to $1.30 per share, $5.20 annually, payable on May 16, 2025.

news.summary: HOBOKEN, New Jersey - On April 16, 2025, Hain Celestial Group (Nasdaq: HAIN), a prominent global health and wellness company dedicated to promoting healthier lifestyles through their better-for-you brands, announced its plan to release its financial results for the fiscal third quarter on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, before the market opens. The company is set to conduct a webcast conference call at 8:00 AM ET to discuss the outcomes. Representing Hain Celestial during the call will be Wendy Davidson, President and Chief Executive Officer, along with Lee Boyce, Chief Financial Officer. The event will also include a question-and-answer segment involving analysts.
news.headline: Hain Celestial Group (NASDAQ: HAIN) to release fiscal Q3 results on May 7, 2025, with conference call at 8:00 AM ET featuring President/CEO Wendy Davidson and CFO Lee Boyce.

news.summary: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE: GNK) disclosed plans to conduct a conference call on Thursday, May 8, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to review its performance in the first quarter of 2025. The call, along with a slide presentation, will be accessible online. Financial outcomes for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, are set to be released on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, subsequent to the market's closure.
news.headline: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited to hold Q1 2025 conference call on May 8, 2025 at 8:30 am ET, with results released on May 7.

news.summary: MINNEAPOLIS - NOG, a leading company, recently announced its first quarter hedging outcomes and shareholder returns. The report detailed significant numbers related to the financial performance and returns to stakeholders.
news.headline: NOG reports on first quarter hedging results and shareholder returns in Minneapolis.Characters: 78

news.summary: Alcoa Corporation announced their first quarter 2025 results, showing a sequential increase in key financial metrics. The period saw rises in Net income, Adjusted net income, and Adjusted EBITDA, excluding special items. Additionally, a joint venture to aid the San Ciprián (Spain) operations was revealed. In terms of financials, revenue for 1Q25 stood at $3,369 million, compared to $3,486 million in 4Q24 and $2,599 million in 1Q24. Net income attributable to Alcoa Corporation was reported at $548 million.
news.headline: Alcoa Corp (NYSE: AA; ASX: AAI) reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue $3.37B, Net income $548M, Adjusted EBITDA rise. Joint venture in Spain announced.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Hapatune LLC, a prominent global marketing agency specialized in bioprocess and life science tools and services, revealed the creation of its wholly-owned Gōdō Kaisha subsidiary in Tokyo, Japan. This move marks a significant expansion for the company, providing it with a foothold in the Japanese market.
news.headline: Hapatune establishes new life science marketing subsidiary in Tokyo, Japan, expanding global presence.

news.summary: Karin De Bondt and Anne Noonan have been appointed as independent directors by DuPont in Wilmington, Delaware on April 16, 2025. These individuals will join the future board of directors, known as the "Electronics Board," with DuPont being listed as DD on the New York Stock Exchange. This move aims to enhance the board's structure and bring diverse perspectives, ultimately benefiting the company's strategic decision-making process.
news.headline: DuPont appoints Karin De Bondt and Anne Noonan as independent directors for Electronics Board. #NYSE: DD #April16, 2025.

news.summary: West Virginia-based company WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq:WSBC) revealed its plan to distribute a quarterly cash dividend for 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred shares through an announcement on April 16, 2025. The bank holding firm operates across multiple states and confirmed this decision via its Board of Directors. It aims to reward its shareholders with this financial move.
news.headline: WesBanco declares quarterly cash dividend on 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred stock. Board of Directors announced on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: CARMEL, Ind., April 16, 2025 - The renowned operator of digital marketplaces for wholesale used vehicles, OPENLANE, Inc. (NYSE: KAR), has announced plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, after the market closes. Additionally, OPENLANE is set to conduct an earnings event where they will provide insights into their performance during the quarter.
news.headline: OPENLANE (NYSE: KAR) to announce Q1 2025 earnings on May 7. Leading wholesaler of used vehicles.

news.summary: Phenix, 16th April 2025 - Universal Technical Institute, Inc., a prominent workforce education provider specializing in transportation, skilled technicians, energy, and healthcare, has announced that the Company will conduct a conference call on Wednesday, 7th May 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. This call aims to discuss and address matters related to the Company's performance and recent developments. Universal Technical Institute, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol UTI.
news.headline: UTI to hold Q2 conference call on May 7, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET. Provider for transportation, skilled technicians, energy, and healthcare. NYSE: UTI.

news.summary: Select Water Solutions, Inc. revealed today that they will be sharing their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, after the market closes. The company, listed under NYSE as WTTR, is planning to hold a conference in light of this update.
news.headline: Select Water Solutions (WTTR) to release 2025 first quarter financial results on May 6, 2025 after market close.

news.summary: Today, in Pittsburgh, EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.1575 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be disbursed on June 2, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of May 7, 2025.
news.headline: EQT declares $0.1575 per share quarterly cash dividend on common stock, payable June 2, 2025.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBX), the parent company of Third Coast Bank, revealed plans to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, April 23, 2025, after the markets close. The information was announced by the company's management team.
news.headline: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc. will release 2025 Q1 earnings on April 23, 2025 after market close - PRNewswire.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Dothan, Alabama, Construction Partners, Inc. revealed plans for upcoming projects. The Company, listed on NASDAQ as ROAD, focuses on civil infrastructure like roads in the Sunbelt region. Known for its local market presence, Construction Partners, Inc. is set to embark on new ventures.
news.headline: Construction Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ: ROAD) to announce Q2 earnings on April 16, 2025, specializing in road construction.

news.summary: In March 2025, home sales surged by 23% compared to February, signaling a significant rise in activity as the market headed towards the peak summer months. This increase was accompanied by a mounting inventory of homes. The trend also saw prices on the rise. March proved to be a crucial period in the seasonal rhythm of the real estate market, setting the stage for a busy and potentially lucrative summer selling season.
news.headline: March home sales increased by 23% over February, reflecting a seasonal uptick with rising prices.

news.summary: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. has made an announcement regarding the release of its first-quarter 2025 earnings. The company has scheduled conference call dates for this event. Shareholders and interested parties can look forward to gaining insights into the company's performance during this period. This update signifies an important milestone for TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. as they continue to navigate the market landscape. Stay tuned for further details on the earnings release and conference call dates.
news.headline: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. in New York announces first quarter 2025 earnings release and conference call dates.

news.summary: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve Chairman, suggested that the tariffs imposed by President Trump may pose difficulties, as they create a conflict between controlling inflation and boosting growth. This statement from Powell led to a drop in the Dow Jones index. This suggests that the current administration's trade policies are causing concern among financial markets and policy makers alike.
news.headline: Fed Chair Powell suggests challenges with Trump tariffs relating to inflation and growth, causing Dow Jones to tumble.
